$comment: Copy to sites.json (gitignored) and fill in real credentials, OR point WP_FLEET_CONFIG at a file like this, OR pass the whole object as the WP_FLEET_SITES env var. appPassword = a WordPress Application Password (Users → Profile → Application Passwords); spaces are fine.

sites.label: Example Site
sites.appPassword: xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx

sites.label: Another Site
sites.appPassword: yyyy yyyy yyyy yyyy yyyy yyyy
